name: Shanghai Feilo Acoustics Co., Ltd
summary: Shanghai Feilo Acoustics Co., Ltd engages in research, development, and production of lighting products in China and internationally. It offers landscape lighting, road lighting, automotive lighting, indoor lighting, and other commercial lighting products, as well as electrical appliances, lamps and lanterns, and parts and components under the Ya and Sylvania brands. The company is also involved in the research and development, production, sale, and installation of LED products. Shanghai Feilo Acoustics Co., Ltd was founded in 1984 and is based in Shanghai, China.
